calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Lisa Sarto, CSR#8994. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Continued To Nov-05-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise Hearing In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 12,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Calendar error - duplicate entry.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing this day on compromise of a minor's claim. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon. Ron Wecht, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and gave evidence. The court signed the compromise as follows: Compromise: $34,000.00; Fees: $6,913.78; Costs: 6,344.89 with a net balance of $20,741.33 of which $20,000.00 to be purchased in a single annuity and the balance of $741.33 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank, Pleasant Hill Branch, 699 Contra Costa Blvd., Pleasant Hill, California, until the minor reaches age 18. Order signed in open court as well as Order to deposit money into a blocked account.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2002 Continued To Sep-17-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 9/17/2002 at 10:00 AM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Set For Trial On May-06-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-06-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-16-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Case settled, the terms of which are as following: defendant Smart Carte Corp will pay to plaintiff $37,500, with a mutual release and dismissal of complaint and cross-complaint, subject to approval of minor's compromise.

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2001 Assigned To Master Calendar
